div.head: 431. Telegram 1338 from GenevaSource: Department of State, Central Files, 611.93/1–556. Confidential; Priority. Repeated to Prague Priority for the Ambassador as telegram 21.
div.p: Following is English text letter addressed Johnson delivered by representative CHICOM Consulate General to Consul General Gowen 3:25 today. As in case December 28 letter (Geneva’s 1320) neither English nor Chinese text bears Wang’s autograph. Signature is typed. Dated Geneva January 5.

I have asked you, in letter of December 28, to investigate serious matter regarding Chinese student [name not declassified] who is prevented from returning to China, and give me satisfactory reply. I still wait your reply.
